queries: (("Endometrial Neoplasms"[Mesh] OR endometrial cancer[tiab] OR endometrial carcinoma[tiab] OR uterine endometrial cancer[tiab]) AND (stage IV[tiab] OR "stage 4"[tiab] OR FIGO IV[tiab] OR metastatic[tiab] OR advanced[tiab]) AND ("Cytoreduction Surgical Procedures"[Mesh] OR cytoreductive surgery[tiab] OR cytoreduction[tiab] OR debulking[tiab] OR debulking surgery[tiab] OR tumor debulking[tiab] OR tumour debulking[tiab] OR maximal cytoreduction[tiab]))

("Endometrial Neoplasms/surgery"[Mesh] AND ("Cytoreduction Surgical Procedures"[Mesh]) AND ("Neoplasm Metastasis"[Mesh] OR "Neoplasm Staging"[Mesh] OR stage IV[tiab] OR FIGO[tiab]) AND ("Survival Rate"[Mesh] OR "Mortality"[Mesh] OR "Prognosis"[Mesh] OR overall survival[tiab]))

((("Endometrial Neoplasms"[Mesh] OR endometrial carcinoma[tiab] OR endometrial cancer[tiab]) AND (stage IV[tiab] OR FIGO IV[tiab] OR metastatic[tiab]) AND ("Cytoreduction Surgical Procedures"[Mesh] OR cytoreductive surgery[tiab] OR debulking[tiab]) AND (complete[tiab] OR optimal[tiab] OR suboptimal[tiab] OR incomplete[tiab] OR residual[tiab])) AND (randomized[tiab] OR randomised[tiab] OR trial[tiab] OR "Clinical Trial"[Publication Type] OR cohort[tiab] OR prospective[tiab] OR retrospective[tiab] OR "Comparative Study"[Publication Type] OR multicenter[tiab] OR multicentre[tiab] OR observational[tiab]))

(("Endometrial Neoplasms"[Mesh] OR endometrial carcinoma[tiab] OR endometrial cancer[tiab]) AND (primary[tiab] OR "de novo"[tiab]) AND (stage IV[tiab] OR FIGO IV[tiab]) AND (complete cytoreduction[tiab] OR R0[tiab] OR CC-0[tiab] OR "no gross residual"[tiab] OR "no residual disease"[tiab] OR optimal debulking[tiab] OR maximal cytoreduction[tiab] OR suboptimal debulking[tiab] OR incomplete cytoreduction[tiab] OR residual tumor[tiab] OR residual tumour[tiab])) NOT (recurrent[tiab] OR recurrence[tiab] OR HIPEC[tiab] OR "Hyperthermic Intraperitoneal Chemotherapy"[tiab] OR "intraperitoneal chemotherapy"[tiab])

inclusion_criteria: Adults with histologically confirmed primary stage IV endometrial cancer at initial diagnosis (entire cohort or extractable stage IV subgroup).
Patients underwent primary or interval cytoreductive surgery with residual disease categorized as complete/no gross residual or optimal (≤1 cm) versus incomplete (>1 cm or gross residual).
Comparative study designs (RCTs, prospective or retrospective cohorts) that report outcomes for both complete/optimal and incomplete CRS groups.
Reports overall survival (e.g., median OS, Kaplan–Meier data, or hazard ratios for OS) for the comparison groups.
exclusion_criteria: Studies of recurrent disease, secondary cytoreduction, or mixed-stage cohorts without separate, extractable stage IV data.
Single-arm case series, case reports, non-comparative studies, reviews, editorials, or conference abstracts without full data; studies not involving cytoreductive surgery.
No overall survival reported by CRS completeness or insufficient data to estimate OS.
Non-endometrial uterine tumors (e.g., uterine sarcomas) or other gynecologic primaries; studies focusing solely on non-surgical treatments.
screening_criteria.description: Screen for comparative studies of primary stage IV endometrial cancer assessing overall survival by completeness of cytoreductive surgery (complete/optimal vs incomplete).

included_articles.title: The role of surgical cytoreduction in Stage IV endometrial carcinoma.
Clinicopathological prognostic factors and the role of cytoreduction in surgical stage IVb endometrial cancer: a retrospective multi-institutional analysis of 248 patients in Japan.
The role of optimal debulking in advanced stage serous carcinoma of the uterus.
Surgical cytoreduction in stage IV endometrioid endometrial carcinoma.
Stage IVB endometrial carcinoma: the role of cytoreductive surgery and determinants of survival.
Optimal cytoreduction followed by chemoradiation in stage IVB uterine serous carcinoma.
The role of cytoreductive surgery in the management of stage IV uterine papillary serous carcinoma.
